description: Local override on top of the shared preset. Dependabot owns security remediation (its automated security-fix PRs stay on), so Renovate cedes vulnerability PRs and handles routine version currency only - the two tools never open a PR for the same fix.
General updates are scoped to this repo's own manifests so the qlty ESLint tool sandbox keeps taking its versions from the standard alone.

Non-major updates automerge once the required checks pass; a short stability window (minimumReleaseAge) holds every update so a broken or yanked release is never merged unattended. Majors and peer-range changes stay behind Dependency Dashboard approval so a human reads the changelog.

packageRules.description: Re-enable general dependency updates that the shared preset's catch-all disables. Scoped to this repo's own manifests so the qlty tool sandbox keeps taking its versions from the standard alone.
Default catch-all: one grouped non-major PR, automerged when the required checks pass.
Vue ecosystem moves together, automerged when the required checks pass.
Build and test tooling moves together, automerged when the required checks pass.
Peer ranges are the published contract: widen rather than replace, and never open a PR without approval.
Majors are reviewed one at a time, behind dashboard approval.
